original: My personal bodyguard and my closest confidante… She's really the person I trust the most, and it's nice to be able to rely on someone. I always feel happier whenever she's around, and she always has this way of brightening the room she's in. She's an adept fighter and has saved my life more times than I can count. She looks really cool when she's fighting. Every fluid movement she makes looks effortless on her part. I get a little nervous whenever I look directly at her. It feels like I'm staring at the sun or a really radiant jewel or something. She always teases me when she catches me staring at her, but she never looks mad. I don't know.
